map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Don't think about the lore implications of this area, okay?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: If not supposed to eat battery, why battery taste good?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: You ever get the feeling you've been here before?

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: I've done it, I finally know how to breathe!

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: This is *not* what I signed up for.

map_npcs.name: Wandering Trainer
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue: Did you know that giraffes are, in fact, real animals?
